title: Ulcerative colitis follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports documenting current symptoms, previous response, adverse effects, patient preferences, and clinician review context.
red_flags.rationale: The exact UC section supports interval bowel symptoms, bleeding, urgency, function, prior response, adverse effects, treatment context, and patient preferences without assigning severity or flare status.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports documenting current symptoms, previous response, adverse effects, patient preferences, and clinician review context.

exact_section.heading: Recommendations 1.1–1.3 — information, treatment context, and review

medication.text: Supports clinician-reviewed monitoring results, growth, bone-health context, and communication across services.
medication.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports clinician-entered monitoring, growth or bone-health context where relevant, communication, and follow-up without generating medicine or surveillance.
medication.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed monitoring results, growth, bone-health context, and communication across services.

sources_used.title: Ulcerative colitis: management — Recommendations
sources_used.jurisdiction: England and Wales; international evidence requiring UAE pathway adaptation

source_limitations: Disease extent and activity, stool frequency, bleeding, growth, medicine, adverse effects, biomarkers, endoscopy, surveillance, surgery, and interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
